## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `.\gradlew.bat :composeApp:desktopTest`
- [ ] `.\gradlew.bat build -x :innertube:test`
- [ ] Relevant provider/network checks, if needed

## Risk checks

- [ ] Scope is described and focused.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, local `.env` files, `local.properties`, or signing material are included.
- [ ] Screenshots are included for UI changes.
- [ ] Playback was checked when relevant.
- [ ] Offline/download behavior was checked when relevant.
- [ ] Queue/session persistence was checked when relevant.
- [ ] Installer/package behavior was checked when relevant.

## Notes

Add known limitations, follow-up work, or manual QA notes.
